author: kevaundray
content: <@944007601400741989> do you know how different your scheme is from the scheme that Guilio and Barnabas are doing for engine_newPayload?

content: Also for ethrex, did you have a way for the ethrex client to specify that they wanted engine_newPayloadWithWitness?

author: kevaundray
content: I would probably aim to not block on their effort and only enable it if 8025 is enabled, but aim to align on whatever’s happening with Guilio and maybe nethermind (unsure how slow they will be)
